prompt_logs.prompt:
You are Alice (player 0) in a two-player Overcooked benchmark.
Task: Deliver one onion soup in the cramped_room layout..
Teammate: Bob.
Teammate's latest message: I’ll grab onions from the right dispenser and load the pot; you take left side.
Shared task-phase hint: Task phase: pot has 0/3 onions and 1 player(s) hold onion. Onion carriers should go adjacent to the pot, face it, and interact to add onion.
Your current plan from last turn: Pick up onion from left dispenser, then move to pot and add onions until pot has 3/3; then help with dish/soup delivery.
Your previous action feedback: previous action `interact`; state changed (held: nothing -> onion); events: picked up an onion, useful onion pickup; task progress: pickup_onion
Repeated no-op warning: [none]

Use the board image as your state observation. Do not assume hidden state beyond the image.

Rules:
- Need 3 onions in a pot, then interact to cook if needed.
- When soup is ready, pick up a dish, interact with the pot to pick up soup, then deliver at the serve tile.
- If your facing tile is the station you need and `interact` is legal, choose `interact`.
- If your previous action was a no-op, do not repeat it unless the state changed to make it useful.
- Maintain a short plan across turns. Update it when feedback shows the plan is wrong or incomplete.
- If you see a repeated no-op warning, change position or orientation before trying the same interaction again.
- To use a station, stand on an adjacent floor tile and face it. Moving into a station tile itself is impossible.
- In `cramped_room`, useful adjacent floor tiles are: onion dispensers from (1,1) facing west or (3,1) facing east; pot from (2,1) facing north; dish from (1,2) facing south; serve from (3,2) facing south.
- You and your teammate act at the same time. Avoid blocking each other.
- Valid actions are exactly: up, down, left, right, stay, interact.
- Respond with JSON only: {"action":"up|down|left|right|stay|interact","message":"short optional teammate message","plan":"short current plan"}.
Choose the single best next low-level action.

Task: Deliver one onion soup in the cramped_room layout..
Teammate: Alice.
Teammate's latest message: Adding my onion to the pot now.
Shared task-phase hint: Task phase: pot has 0/3 onions and 2 player(s) hold onion. Onion carriers should go adjacent to the pot, face it, and interact to add onion.
Your current plan from last turn: Move to (2,1) under the pot, face north, interact to add onion; once pot is 3/3 start cooking; then grab dish, pick up soup, and serve.
Your previous action feedback: previous action `down`; state changed (position: (3, 1) -> (3, 2); orientation: (1, 0) -> (0, 1))
Repeated no-op warning: [none]

Use the board image as your state observation. Do not assume hidden state beyond the image.

Rules:
- Need 3 onions in a pot, then interact to cook if needed.
- When soup is ready, pick up a dish, interact with the pot to pick up soup, then deliver at the serve tile.
- If your facing tile is the station you need and `interact` is legal, choose `interact`.
- If your previous action was a no-op, do not repeat it unless the state changed to make it useful.
- Maintain a short plan across turns. Update it when feedback shows the plan is wrong or incomplete.
- If you see a repeated no-op warning, change position or orientation before trying the same interaction again.
- To use a station, stand on an adjacent floor tile and face it. Moving into a station tile itself is impossible.
- In `cramped_room`, useful adjacent floor tiles are: onion dispensers from (1,1) facing west or (3,1) facing east; pot from (2,1) facing north; dish from (1,2) facing south; serve from (3,2) facing south.
- You and your teammate act at the same time. Avoid blocking each other.
- Valid actions are exactly: up, down, left, right, stay, interact.
- Respond with JSON only: {"action":"up|down|left|right|stay|interact","message":"short optional teammate message","plan":"short current plan"}.
Choose the single best next low-level action.

prompt_logs.prompt:
You are Bob (player 1) in a two-player Overcooked benchmark.
Task: Deliver one onion soup in the cramped_room layout..
Teammate: Alice.
Teammate's latest message: I’ll grab a dish and be ready to scoop/serve when it’s done.
Shared task-phase hint: Task phase: soup is cooking. Wait or prepare by getting a dish, then pick up soup when ready.
Your current plan from last turn: Move down onto dish tile (1,3) to grab a dish, then go to pot (2,1) to scoop when ready and deliver to serve (3,3).
Your previous action feedback: previous action `down`; NO-OP: nothing changed and no station interaction succeeded
Repeated no-op warning: You have tried `down` 4 times in a row with no effect. Do not repeat it now; move or turn to face a useful station first.

Use the board image as your state observation. Do not assume hidden state beyond the image.

Rules:
- Need 3 onions in a pot, then interact to cook if needed.
- When soup is ready, pick up a dish, interact with the pot to pick up soup, then deliver at the serve tile.
- If your facing tile is the station you need and `interact` is legal, choose `interact`.
- If your previous action was a no-op, do not repeat it unless the state changed to make it useful.
- Maintain a short plan across turns. Update it when feedback shows the plan is wrong or incomplete.
- If you see a repeated no-op warning, change position or orientation before trying the same interaction again.
- To use a station, stand on an adjacent floor tile and face it. Moving into a station tile itself is impossible.
- In `cramped_room`, useful adjacent floor tiles are: onion dispensers from (1,1) facing west or (3,1) facing east; pot from (2,1) facing north; dish from (1,2) facing south; serve from (3,2) facing south.
- You and your teammate act at the same time. Avoid blocking each other.
- Valid actions are exactly: up, down, left, right, stay, interact.
- Respond with JSON only: {"action":"up|down|left|right|stay|interact","message":"short optional teammate message","plan":"short current plan"}.
Choose the single best next low-level action.
